roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S SUPPL BRIEF IN OPPOS TO MOT TO SUPP EVID FILED
DA PEOP OPPOS TO DEFT MOT TO SUPP EVID FILED TODAY IN ROOM 101

/CAL  BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/AMEND 2/X THE PEOPLE AMEND TO ADD COUNT2, PC653F(D), A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/IBARRA/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/ORPJ/X: DEFT IS TO CALL IN TO ORPJ THREE TIMES PER WEEK/SA2: MARKET AND 6THSTREETS, SF/SAORD/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 6D  /CTS 6   /WS/RX/VF1/SECFEE/COLLECT/SAOD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF MARKET & 6TH STREETS IN SF/SAORD3/OBEY/ACCEP/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BW/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/X:DEFT MAY BE ADDED BACK TO CALENDAR,/
CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING AND 1538,5PC MOTION/DOP
